facebook.caption: POV: you took a wrong turn in Duong Bao and found Beach House - The Beach Club. 4.6 stars. 111 reviews. And somehow still feels like your own discovery. Sand under your feet, drink in hand, zero resort crowd energy. This is the Phu Quoc beach bar vibe people actually come here for. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Wrong turn. Best decision. Beach House - The Beach Club in Duong Bao hits different when you find it yourself. 4.6 stars, cold drinks, real beach energy. Go.
